title: Oriental Ink Luxury Jewelry Campaign Poster AI
sourceTitle: Oriental Ink Luxury Jewelry Campaign Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 9:16 original high-end Oriental ink luxury jewelry campaign poster featuring black-gold lotus pendant necklace with visible collarbone and gold filigree detail. Subject: black-gold lotus pendant necklace with visible collarbone and gold filigree detail is the clear visual hero, displayed by thigh-up near-camera interactive portrait with direct gentle gaze, shy smile, and approachable romantic posture; jewelry craftsmanship must remain large enough to read in thumbnail view and never be hidden by hair or clothing. Scene: fixed source composition, crop, hierarchy, and layout rule from the prompt creates a white-but-not-empty rice-paper field with light xuan-paper texture, soft mist, low-saturation ink atmosphere, and restrained Eastern imagery that supports the jewelry. Composition: Fixed vertical 9:16 luxury campaign poster composition: elegant adult East Asian muse, jewelry as the strongest focal point, graceful modern Eastern fashion silhouette, generous ink-wash negative space, refined gold line detail, and one single independent image. Signature Elements: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Fixed source details: Garment Palette: ink-black and warm-gold modern Eastern couture silhouette; Background Motif: ink-wash negative space, soft cream rice paper, subtle lotus shadow, and fine gold linework. Style: Oriental ink fashion illustration fused with high-jewelry campaign design, light luxury brand hero visual, fine gold line drawing, xuan-paper texture, modern Eastern aesthetic, airy ink-wash rhythm, and refined jewelry craftsmanship detail. Color Palette: fixed source color palette with concrete palette cues from the prompt supports the jewelry without stealing focus, with rice-paper cream, ink wash, soft mist gradients, restrained gold linework, and luminous gemstone or pearl accents. Lighting: Soft high-end jewelry campaign lighting with pearlescent glow, jade translucency or gemstone sparkle, fine metal highlights, gentle fabric falloff, and clean atmospheric softness. Camera: Vertical fashion-poster view with clear jewelry visibility, elegant muse silhouette, restrained face and body detail, refined posture, and enough negative space for luxury campaign breathing room. Materials: Pearl luster, jade translucency, metal inlay, filigree structure, hanging chains, fine gold lines, openwork texture, gemstone reflections, sheer gauze, soft drape, ink diffusion, and xuan-paper grain. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Theme: 9:16 original high-end Oriental ink luxury jewelry campaign poster featuring black-gold lotus pendant necklace with visible collarbone and gold filigree detail. Subject: black-gold lotus pendant necklace with visible collarbone and gold filigree detail is the clear visual hero, displayed by thigh-up near-camera interactive portrait with direct gentle gaze, shy smile, and approachable romantic posture; jewelry craftsmanship must remain large enough to read in thumbnail view and never be hidden by hair or clothing. Scene: fixed source composition, crop, hierarchy, and layout rule from the prompt creates a white-but-not-empty rice-paper field with light xuan-paper texture, soft mist, low-saturation ink atmosphere, and restrained Eastern imagery that supports the jewelry. Composition: Fixed vertical 9:16 luxury campaign poster composition: elegant adult East Asian muse, jewelry as the strongest focal point, graceful modern Eastern fashion silhouette, generous ink-wash negative space, refined gold line detail, and one single independent image. Signature Elements: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Fixed source details: Garment Palette: ink-black and warm-gold modern Eastern couture silhouette; Background Motif: ink-wash negative space, soft cream rice paper, subtle lotus shadow, and fine gold linework. Style: Oriental ink fashion illustration fused with high-jewelry campaign design, light luxury brand hero visual, fine gold line drawing, xuan-paper texture, modern Eastern aesthetic, airy ink-wash rhythm, and refined jewelry craftsmanship detail. Color Palette: fixed source color palette with concrete palette cues from the prompt supports the jewelry without stealing focus, with rice-paper cream, ink wash, soft mist gradients, restrained gold linework, and luminous gemstone or pearl accents. Lighting: Soft high-end jewelry campaign lighting with pearlescent glow, jade translucency or gemstone sparkle, fine metal highlights, gentle fabric falloff, and clean atmospheric softness. Camera: Vertical fashion-poster view with clear jewelry visibility, elegant muse silhouette, restrained face and body detail, refined posture, and enough negative space for luxury campaign breathing room. Materials: Pearl luster, jade translucency, metal inlay, filigree structure, hanging chains, fine gold lines, openwork texture, gemstone reflections, sheer gauze, soft drape, ink diffusion, and xuan-paper grain. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
promptTranslations.ja:
以下の英語画像生成プロンプトを使用してください。表示テキスト、ブランド名、変数値、パラメータは英語のまま保持します。

promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.
